hero.title: Explore the Infinite Beauty of Fractals
hero.subtitle: Real-time fractal explorer — zoom into infinite detail, customize colors, and export mathematical art.

empty.description: Star your favorite fractals to show them here.

gallery.title: Gallery
gallery.description: Explore featured fractals or browse your saved collection.
gallery.fullscreenHint: Click anywhere or press Esc to exit

starterBrot.name: Starter Mandelbrot
starterBrot.description: The smallest escape-time formula, useful for learning the init / loop / bailout structure first.

parameterDrift.name: Parameter Drift
parameterDrift.description: Demonstrates p1 / p2 parameter slots and the difference between cabs and |z|.

orbitEcho.name: Orbit Echo
orbitEcho.description: Uses zPrev as feedback memory and pairs well with orbitEcho coloring for orbit envelopes.

fnSlotWeave.name: Fn Slot Weave
fnSlotWeave.description: Demonstrates fn1 / fn2 and parameter slots as a Fractint-compatible authoring template.

branchGarden.name: Branch Garden
branchGarden.description: Shows if / elseif / else branches mixed with trigonometric updates.

customLibrary.title: Custom Formulas
customLibrary.examplesDescription: Load a working example first, then reshape it into your own formula in the editor.

juliaC.label: Julia Parameter (c)
juliaC.pickHint: Tip: click a point on Mandelbrot to set c and switch to Julia.

controls.formulaNoParameters: This formula uses its built-in defaults and does not need extra controls.
controls.transformNoParameters: This transform uses its built-in defaults and does not need extra controls.

editor.title: Formula Editor
editor.loadFailedDescription: Unable to load the code editor. Please refresh the page.
editor.saveFailedDescription: Unable to save the current formula
editor.restoreSuccessDescription: The editor has been rolled back to the most recent successful source.
editor.defaultViewSetDescription: Saving will persist the current Explore view with this custom formula.
editor.glslError: GLSL compile error (mapped from formula source)
editor.glslErrorUnmapped: GLSL compile error (location cannot be mapped)

home.title: FractalPark - Fractal Art Explorer | Create & Explore Digital Art
home.description: Explore the infinite beauty of fractal art with FractalPark. Create stunning digital art using 94 fractal formulas, real-time WebGL rendering, and custom color palettes.
home.ogDescription: Create and explore mesmerizing fractal art with 94 formulas, real-time GPU rendering, and custom palettes.

explore.title: Explore Fractals | Interactive Fractal Generator - FractalPark
explore.description: Interactive fractal explorer with Mandelbrot, Julia, Newton and 94 built-in formulas. Real-time WebGL rendering with custom colors and high-res export.
explore.ogDescription: Explore mathematical beauty in real-time. 94 fractal formulas, GPU-accelerated rendering.

gallery.title: My Gallery | Personal Fractal Collection - FractalPark
gallery.description: Your personal fractal art gallery. Save, organize and share your favorite fractal creations.

about.title: About | Fractal Art & Digital Mathematics - FractalPark
about.description: Learn about FractalPark - a WebGL-powered fractal art exploration tool. Built with Next.js, TypeScript and GPU shaders for real-time rendering.

about.title: About FractalPark
about.intro: FractalPark is a fractal art exploration project that brings the beauty of mathematical fractals to your browser. Using WebGL for real-time rendering, you can explore the infinite complexity of the Mandelbrot set with stunning color palettes.
about.aiDescription: FractalPark is a browser-based fractal art generator using WebGL for real-time GPU rendering. It features 94 built-in escape-time fractal formulas (Mandelbrot, Julia, Newton, Phoenix, Magnet, McMullen, rational, transcendental families), a custom formula editor with Fractint .frm syntax support, 7 UV transform plugins, 9 coloring modes, and high-resolution PNG export. Built with Next.js 16, React 19, TypeScript 5, and Tailwind CSS. The rendering engine uses a plugin architecture with dynamic GLSL shader assembly and LRU caching.

techStack.title: Technology
techStack.description: Built with Next.js, WebGL, and TypeScript. Real-time fractal rendering powered by GPU shaders.
techStack.frontend: Frontend: Next.js 16 (App Router), React 19, TypeScript 5, Tailwind CSS 4, shadcn/ui
techStack.rendering: Rendering: WebGL 1 (GLSL fragment shaders), plugin-based architecture, shader LRU cache
techStack.formula: Formula System: Custom Fractint .frm parser, CodeMirror 6 editor, AST-to-GLSL transpiler
techStack.deployment: Deployment: Vercel with Analytics and Speed Insights

openSource.title: Open Source
openSource.description: FractalPark is built with open source technologies including Next.js, React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, shadcn/ui, and CodeMirror 6. The project explores the intersection of mathematics, art, and web technology.

aiFriendly.title: AI Friendly
aiFriendly.description: This website provides structured documentation for AI assistants at /llms.txt and /llms-full.txt, enabling AI tools to understand and recommend FractalPark's features.

vision.title: Vision
vision.description: We aim to make fractal exploration accessible and beautiful. Future plans include more fractal types, deeper zoom capabilities, and community sharing features.
